core_mechanism: confinement of particles in a conservative potential well created by the gradient (spatial intensity profile) of an applied field coupling to the particles' induced dipole, with population adiabatically transferred by spatial overlap from a free-space potential minimum into a guided-mode potential channel
brief_reason: The abstract describes atoms being held in a trap 'formed by a red-detuned gaussian light mode' and loaded from a free-space dipole trap into the fiber-core mode, i.e. an intensity-gradient potential well into which population is transferred through overlapping wells.
